case_title: ERIC WILLIAM WARNER VS. THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, ERIC WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DOES 1 TO 1000 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-20-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-05-2011

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WARNER, ERIC WILLIAM

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-23-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ERIC WARNER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF ERIC WILLIAM WARNER FILED ON 1/20/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT WAS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
